impact:
T-022 shipped the implant infrastructure (10 slots, search, modifier propagation, localStorage persistence within the active builder session) but deferred two pieces:

1. **Saved-fitting persistence.** UserFitting currently has items_json but no implants_json column. To save an implant loadout with a fit:
   - Add implants_json (Text, default "{}") to UserFitting model
   - Migration in app/main.py startup block (idempotent ALTER TABLE)
   - Update /tools/fitting/save endpoint to read body.implants and store
   - Update /tools/fitting/load/{id} to return implants in response
   - Update fitting_tool.html loadFitting() to populate state.implants

2. **Active jump-clone auto-import.** When a character is selected via the skill-char dropdown, fetch their currently-active clone's implants from ESI (GET /characters/{character_id}/clones/) and offer a "Load active clone" button. Needs:
   - esi-clones.read_implants.v1 scope (already in EVE_SCOPES if dashboard uses clones)
   - New route /tools/fitting/clone-implants/{character_id} returning the active clone's implant type IDs
   - Frontend button next to the implant search that fetches + populates the slots
   - Visual indicator showing which slots came from the clone vs. manual

Both are well-scoped follow-ups for a future session. MVP in main implant features works as of 0fbd6d6 (drake align time changes when an Evasive Maneuvering hardwiring is added, verified live).
title: Implants: persist with saved fits + auto-import from active jump clone
